name: pure_risk_allocation
edge_thesis: 不预测方向;按已实现风险分配和目标波动率控制总暴露,叠加回撤硬止损与定期再平衡,追求风险调整稳健和显著低于buy&hold的回撤
promotion_policy: candidates-only; requires significant drawdown reduction, Sharpe/Calmar not worse than buy&hold and equal-weight benchmarks, walk-forward OOS stability, and net-cost validation before any further review
